evidence.description: REQ-002/REQ-018: prepareSaveRequest delegates to buildValidatedSaveRequest factory which derives body atomically from blocks
REQ-018: factory derives body = serializeBlocksToMarkdown(blocks) at single construction site
REQ-008/REQ-018: SaveNoteRequested propagates blocks AND derived body from validatedRequest
REQ-009/REQ-018: NoteFileSaved propagates blocks AND body from validatedRequest
REQ-003 Revision 4 broader rule: paragraph (empty/whitespace) OR divider blocks return true; structural-distinctiveness rule rejects heading-1/2/3/bullet/numbered/code/quote regardless of content
PROP-024 sub-claims A/B/C exercised: factory invariant (fast-check, 200 runs), SaveNoteRequested coherence, NoteFileSaved coherence
PROP-025 covers all 8 variants from REQ-003 table plus structural-distinctiveness sweep across all 7 distinct types
PROP-028 Tier-0 type-level assertion via Equal<typeof canonicalCaptureAutoSave, CaptureAutoSave>
All 5 isEmpty=true variants generated: single-empty-para, multi-empty-para, whitespace-para, divider-only, divider-and-empty
REQ-013 error variants (permission, disk-full, lock) covered with FsError → NoteSaveFailureReason mapping
REQ-005 InvariantViolated path covered: clock returning past timestamp
serializeNote takes only ValidatedSaveRequest; no deps parameter; no I/O
serializeBlocksToMarkdown is pure: deterministic, no side effects, no port calls
noteIsEmpty is pure: structural check on blocks, no I/O, no ports
PROP-014 verified: clockNow() is called exactly once per pipeline run (mutually exclusive empty/non-empty branches)
154 pass, 4 todo, 0 fail — including PROP-014 budget tests
11 PROP beads with status (10 proved, 1 pending for cross-context PROP-027)
Sprint 2 implementation beads (BEAD-067..072) wire to corresponding PROP beads
Sprint 2 test beads (BEAD-056..066) reference test files with status=green

summary: Sprint 2 implementation correctly wires the block-based migration: build-validated-save-request factory enforces body=serializeBlocksToMarkdown(blocks) at the single construction site (REQ-018), prepareSaveRequest threads blocks through atomically (REQ-002), pipeline propagates blocks+body into SaveNoteRequested and NoteFileSaved without re-deriving (REQ-008/REQ-009), noteIsEmpty implements the broader Revision 4 rule covering all 5 isEmpty=true variants (REQ-003), and PROP-014 budget holds across all paths. Five non-blocking findings (FIND-021..025) note: (1) canonicalCaptureAutoSave is a runtime-throwing placeholder satisfying only the type-level signature, (2) PROP-026 roundtrip generators omit heading/bullet/numbered/code/quote types so structural roundtrip is untested for 5 of 8 BlockTypes, (3) pipeline integration tests universally mock noteIsEmpty so the real predicate is never exercised end-to-end, (4) PROP-025 misses Unicode whitespace cases (NBSP U+00A0, full-width U+3000) explicitly enumerated in verification-architecture, (5) one PROP-025 test re-implements the predicate inline rather than testing the exported function. None of these block PASS — the impl satisfies every REQ-001..018 acceptance criterion observable from the spec, and all required-true PROPs are proved with non-trivial property tests.
